creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Martin Kammerhofer wrote:

> >Synopsis:       lower case S/KEY passwords don't work

Huh?

I do it all day...  I can't tell you exactly, but i'm probably doing
an average of at least 10, maybe 20 S/Key logins to FreeBSD machines
per week, and mind you, i never type them upper case.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
